description:
List Change Order Packages.

See [Filtering on List Actions](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/filtering-on-list-actions) for information on using the filtering capabilities provided by this endpoint.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[reviewed_at]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) reviewed within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.

parameters.name: filters[due_date]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) due within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.

parameters.name: filters[include_deleted]
parameters.description: Use 'only' for only deleted resources. Use 'with' for deleted and undeleted resources.

parameters.name: filters[invoiced_date]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) invoiced within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.

parameters.name: filters[paid_date]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) paid within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.

parameters.name: filters[signed_change_order_received_date]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with a signed change order received date within the specified ISO 8601 date range.

base_currency_iso_code.description: Base Currency ISO Code configured from project level; It'll be populated only when multicurrency phase two feature flag is enabled

currency_iso_code.description: Currency ISO Code configured for the financial entity

401.description: User does not have correct permissions.

403.description: User does not have correct permissions.

404.description: Specified Contract does not exists or User does not have access to it
